title: The Bomb Is Lifted
description: On pages 1–8, this part focuses on the bomb is lifted, keeping the scene centered on the conflict, choices, and stakes of the Alabasta arc.
scene: The Bomb Is Lifted. Pell carries Alabasta’s hope into the air as the bomb plot reaches its most sacrificial moment. This section presents the immediate scene beat before the dialogue continues.

dialogue.speaker: Vivi
dialogue.text: Did you know that a recent study has shown that Japanese youths have high reading skills compared to those of other countries? Isn't that incredible? Incredible, right? And do you know why? The Japanese youths who have particularly great reading skills are those who often read manga. Isn't that incredible? Well?

dialogue.speaker: Pell
dialogue.text: The gate's been broken down by the Kicking Claw!

dialogue.speaker: Chaka
dialogue.text: That's the elite guard for you!

dialogue.speaker: Crocodile
dialogue.text: Your highness... To protect you with our very lives is our highest duty...

dialogue.speaker: Miss All Sunday
dialogue.text: I'm afraid we cannot just let this man be.

summary: This part develops the bomb is lifted and pushes the Alabasta conflict closer to its next decisive turn.
